hero.title: AirParkHotel
hero.tagline: Next to the Runway, Neighbour to the Sky
hero.subtitle: A unique accommodation experience where aviation, nature and sustainability meet

rooms.title: Rooms & Suites
rooms.subtitle: Closest Accommodation to the Sky
rooms.heroDescription: Discover our selection of carefully designed rooms and suites, each offering premium comfort for an unforgettable stay.

deluxeTwinGardenView.name: New Violet Type Rooms (Garden & Lake View Rooms)
deluxeTwinGardenView.description: In our garden and lake view double rooms, a comfortable and peaceful stay with the privilege of a quiet rural setting and the tranquillity of the lake.
deluxeTwinGardenView.longDescription: A special view where aviation and nature meet… Experience the accommodation closest to the sky. These rooms, specially designed for civil and professional aviators, create an ideal atmosphere for focusing before flight, resting after flight, and renewing amidst nature. With modern lines, ergonomic details and the privilege of a quiet rural setting, every moment spent here becomes a true privilege. Staying at AirParkHotel is not just staying in a room; it is living an experience at the heart of aviation, next to the sky.

deluxeTwinLakeView.name: Purple Violet Type Rooms (Apron & Lake View Rooms)
deluxeTwinLakeView.description: In our apron and lake view double rooms, the spirit of aviation, the energy of the runway and the peace of nature appear in the same window.
deluxeTwinLakeView.longDescription: The calm surface of the lake and the dynamic energy of the runway… In these special view rooms, the silence of nature and the excitement of aviation meet in perfect balance. The lake where optimist and radio-controlled boats glide offers a unique atmosphere that restores your mind, while the apron view lets you feel the living spirit of aviation at every moment. These rooms offer not just comfort but inspiration, peace and a sense of belonging.

deluxeFrenchGardenView.name: Nu.D-36 Type Rooms (Garden View Triple Rooms)
deluxeFrenchGardenView.description: Discover comfort in our lake view triple room, accommodating up to three guests. Ideal for families or friends.
deluxeFrenchGardenView.longDescription: Our lake view triple room offers 30 square meters of refined living space. With one double and one single bed and sophisticated interior design, it provides a comfortable stay for up to three guests.

deluxeFrenchCity.name: Vecihi XIV Type Rooms (Suite Rooms)
deluxeFrenchCity.description: Experience luxurious comfort in our spacious suite rooms, combining the prestige of aviation with the elegance of modern living. Thoughtful design details await you.
deluxeFrenchCity.longDescription: Privileged living spaces that make you feel as if you are living in the sky, sophisticated design and superior comfort… AirParkHotel suite rooms bring together the prestige of aviation and the elegance of modern living. These special spaces, ideal for families, groups of friends and extended stays, offer a perfect environment for both work and rest. The combination of quiet nature, lake view and aviation atmosphere transforms your time here into an unforgettable experience. This is not just a suite; it is a privileged living space next to the sky.

sustainability.subtitle: Our Promise to the Future
sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.description: Renewable energy with solar panels. An accommodation experience that values environmental quality and keeps our promise to future generations.
sustainability.policyParagraph1: At AirParkHotel we pursue a sustainability policy that balances ecological balance with economic growth, ensures the effective use of natural resources, values environmental quality, and meets today's needs without compromising the ability of future generations to meet their own.
sustainability.policyParagraph2: Within the scope of this sustainability policy, we carry out work in social, cultural, environmental and economic areas, and our hotel participates in practices that embrace this policy.
sustainability.pdfSectionDescription: You can read the full text of our policy in the document below.

cta.title: Book your place for an unforgettable experience.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: AirParkHotel respects your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use and protect your personal data when you use our website or stay at our hotel.
privacyPage.s1Content: We may collect your name, contact details (email, phone, address), identity information, payment details, stay preferences and reservation history. We collect this data when you make a reservation, contact us, use our website or stay at the hotel.
privacyPage.s2Content: We use your data to process reservations, provide accommodation and services, communicate with you, improve our services, comply with legal obligations and, with your consent, send you offers and news.
privacyPage.s3Content: We retain your data only as long as necessary for the purposes above or as required by law. We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorised access or loss.
privacyPage.s4Content: You have the right to access, correct, delete or restrict the processing of your data, and to object to processing. You may also have the right to data portability and to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority. To exercise these rights, please contact us using the details in the footer.
privacyPage.s5Content: For any questions about this Privacy Policy or your personal data, please contact us at info@airparkhotel.com or call +90 533 700 72 22.

amenitiesPage.title: Hotel Amenities & Services
amenitiesPage.subtitle: What We Offer
amenitiesPage.description: Make the most of your stay with our on-site amenities and services.

evCharging.title: Electric Vehicle Charging
evCharging.description: We have 2 electric car charging stations on site. Charge your vehicle while you stay—ideal for guests arriving by electric car.

petFriendly.title: Pet Friendly
petFriendly.description: Your four-legged friends are welcome. We are a pet-friendly hotel; please inform us when booking so we can prepare the best stay for you and your pet.

laundryIron.title: Laundry & Iron
laundryIron.description: Laundry and ironing facilities are available so you can travel light and keep your clothes fresh throughout your stay.

openBreakfast.title: Open Buffet Breakfast
openBreakfast.description: Start your day with our open buffet breakfast. A wide selection of hot and cold items, pastries, and beverages is included for a great start to the day.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Discover AirParkHotel
gallery.description: Explore our hotel through photos and videos. Get a glimpse of our rooms, facilities, and the experiences that await you.

spa.title: Spa & Wellness
spa.subtitle: Relaxation & Rejuvenation
spa.description: Escape to our luxurious spa and wellness center. Indulge in a variety of treatments designed to relax your body and rejuvenate your mind.

meeting.title: Events
meeting.subtitle: Professional Event Spaces
meeting.description: Host birthdays, weddings, engagements, corporate events or special celebrations at AirParkHotel. Our modern venues and professional services create unforgettable experiences.

booking.title: Make a Reservation
booking.subtitle: Book Your Stay
booking.description: Complete the form below to reserve your room. Our team will contact you shortly to confirm your reservation.

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.description: You can also reach us directly through the following channels:

contactPage.title: Contact & Transport
contactPage.subtitle: Get in Touch
contactPage.description: Contact us for any questions or reservation requests.
contactPage.transportByCarDescription: Use the map below for directions or click Open in Google Maps to get turn-by-turn navigation to our address.
contactPage.transportByPlaneDescription: You can reach us by flying to Eskişehir Anadolu Airport. Contact our reception for transfer or car rental options from the airport to the hotel.
contactPage.planeNotice: Air traffic must review the approach procedures on the S.H.M. website and obtain a SLOT by contacting Display Director Aysan Keskin.
contactPage.shgAirshowArrivalMapAlt: Map for arrival to SHG Airshow area
contactPage.parkingWarning: For show safety, vehicle parking on the road will not be permitted.

aboutPage.title: About AirParkHotel
aboutPage.subtitle: Closest Accommodation to the Sky
aboutPage.description: Discover our story, our spirit and the one-of-a-kind experience we create for every guest.
aboutPage.paragraph1: AirParkHotel is designed as a contemporary retreat where aviation culture and refined comfort meet. Located next to Sivrihisar Aviation Center, our hotel offers guests a unique experience surrounded by the dynamism of the runway and the calm of the landscape.
aboutPage.paragraph2: Our rooms and suites are created with a focus on functional elegance: everything you need, thoughtfully curated, without excess. From the materials we choose to the services we provide, we prioritise quality, practicality and a warm, welcoming atmosphere.
aboutPage.paragraph3: Whether you are here for a short stopover, a weekend escape or a special event, our team is dedicated to making your stay effortless and memorable. We look forward to welcoming you to AirParkHotel.

opportunitiesPage.title: Opportunities & Offers
opportunitiesPage.subtitle: Stay, Discover, Experience
opportunitiesPage.description: Discover current offers, packages and special opportunities designed to make your stay even more enjoyable.
opportunitiesPage.paragraph1: We regularly create stay packages and special offers tailored to different needs: from weekend escapes and long-stay advantages to group reservations and event collaborations.
opportunitiesPage.paragraph2: If you are planning a corporate event, aviation organisation or group stay, you can contact us for customised packages, flexible date options and special pricing.
opportunitiesPage.paragraph3: For our latest opportunities and campaigns, please reach out to our reservations team or follow our communication channels. We will be happy to design the most suitable option for you.

nature.title: THE CENTER OF NATURE, CALM AND PRIVILEGE
nature.subtitle: Next to the Sky, Away from the City Noise
nature.p1: Nestled in greenery and silence, AirParkHotel offers a unique stay shaped by the serenity of the lake and the inspiring atmosphere of aviation.
nature.p2: You can spend joyful moments with optimist or radio‑controlled boats on the lake, refresh your mind in the stillness of nature and rediscover what true rest really feels like.
nature.p3: AirParkHotel is more than a place to stay; it is a way of life.

aviation.title: A TAILORED STAY FOR AVIATORS
aviation.subtitle: Ready‑for‑Flight Comfort, A Professional Atmosphere
aviation.p1: AirParkHotel is a distinctive property positioned specifically for civil and professional aviation activities. The privilege of staying right next to the runway and apron offers maximum efficiency and comfort for pilots and aviation professionals.
aviation.p2: For those who want to rest between flight plans, focus on training processes, or simply be close to the sky, and for pilots who safely park their aircraft in our hangars, AirParkHotel is much more than an ordinary hotel.

solar.title: AN ECO-FRIENDLY EXPERIENCE POWERED BY SOLAR PANELS
solar.subtitle: Renewable Energy, Responsible Comfort
solar.p1: AirParkHotel’s extensive solar panel installation helps power your stay with clean, renewable energy, reducing our carbon footprint without compromising on comfort.
solar.p2: By investing in solar energy and modern infrastructure, we combine aviation, nature and sustainability in a single landscape, offering a stay that is both inspiring and environmentally conscious.
